dialogue_text: This much, Tars Tarkas, you may do for me in return for the friendship that, I must confess, I feel for you.
source_excerpt: "This much, Tars Tarkas, you may do for me in return for the friendship that, I must confess, I feel for you."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

source_excerpt: "Friendship?" he replied. "There is no such thing, John Carter; but have your will. I shall direct that Sarkoja cease to annoy the girl, and I myself will take the custody of the key."

speaker.notes: Attributed through a role label rather than a canonical name.
